jobs.name: verify-ftc-indexer-live
jobs.prompt:
Check whether the plresearch-indexer Railway redeploy has picked up the FtC lexicons. Run:

curl -s --max-time 15 -X POST https://plresearch-indexer-production.up.railway.app/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ ioFundingthecommonsImpactMetricPoint(first: 2) { edges { node { metric value date } } } }"}'; echo; curl -s --max-time 10 https://plresearch-indexer-production.up.railway.app/stats

If the response contains "metric" (field is live): report success with the recordCount from /stats, and note the FA2 Live Dashboard FtC band (https://www.plresearch.org/areas/economies-governance/impact/live-dashboard/) should now populate within ~60s (ISR). If it still returns 'Cannot query field "ioFundingthecommonsImpactMetricPoint"', tell the user the Railway service likely needs a manual redeploy nudge in the Railway dashboard (consistent with the prior 'chore: trigger redeploy' commit), and offer to push an empty trigger commit to force it.
